tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output

tests.name: phase_state_deployment_field_updated
tests.details: U-J confirmation: phase-state.json .deployment still reads 'personal' after upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational succeeded. APPROVAL_LOG.md frontmatter correctly updated to organizational, but .claude/phase-state.json still shows deployment=personal. This is the U-J known-open bug from the 2026-04-25 sweep.

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: deployment field not written to phase-state.json on upgrade
framework_bugs.reproduction: init.sh --non-interactive ... --deployment personal; then upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational; then jq .deployment .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.actual: .claude/phase-state.json .deployment still 'personal'; APPROVAL_LOG.md frontmatter correctly updated to 'organizational'

framework_bugs.summary: U-G confirmation: intake-wizard.sh PROJECT_ROOT hardcoded to framework
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project dir: bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational
framework_bugs.expected: Should detect PROJECT_INTAKE.md in the cwd (project) and dispatch to scripts/upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational
framework_bugs.actual: intake-wizard.sh sets PROJECT_ROOT=$SCRIPT_DIR/.. (= framework root) and reports 'Error: PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found.' even when invoked from a valid project directory. Confirmed the comment in the script (lines 17-19) acknowledging U-G is deferred to Batch 3.

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook Section F prescribes 'intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment {TARGET_DEPLOYMENT}' for private_poc/sponsored_poc, but (a) intake-wizard exits early due to U-G when invoked from a project dir, and (b) intake-wizard's --upgrade-deployment validator only accepts personal|organizational, not private_poc/sponsored_poc/production. The actual command path used is upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational. Runbook should clarify the workaround until U-G ships.

upgrade-project.sh has no single-step path for personal -> private_poc; help text only documents personal -> organizational and POC -> POC transitions. To establish a private_poc baseline a user must (1) upgrade deployment to organizational, then (2) separately set poc_mode=private_poc. The 'POC modes' table (lines 124-126 of upgrade-project.sh help) does not mention 'organizational/no-poc -> private_poc'.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/upgrade-project.sh --help output and docs/builders-guide.md upgrade section

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 unchanged; git status --short shows only the pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ entries from sweep setup.

summary: Upgrade agent 52 (personal/mobile/light/swift -> organizational baseline) passed init, baseline build-loop, BL-015 sentinel block, and upgrade flow; confirmed two known-open Medium bugs (U-G intake-wizard PROJECT_ROOT, U-J deployment field not persisted to phase-state.json on upgrade).
